text:
is a compilation of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Film Books for Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It was written by Newtype Editorial Department and published by Kadokawa Shoten on 26 November 1999. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/404853128X 

Overview

The book is a compilation of previous books and cover from the Episode:01 to Episode:11.
